---
title: ""
---

# Olawale Olaniyan

## Biostatistics & Data Science Researcher

I use statistical modeling, machine learning, and epidemiological analysis
to solve healthcare and public health problems.

[View Projects](projects.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
[GitHub](https://github.com/DataWale){.btn .btn-outline-dark}

---

## About Me

I am passionate about using data science and statistical methods
to solve healthcare and public health challenges.

My interests include:
- Machine Learning
- Biostatistics
- Epidemiology
- Predictive Modeling
- Healthcare Analytics

---

## Featured Projects

### Heart Disease Prediction

Built machine learning models to predict cardiovascular disease risk
using clinical data.

**Tools:** Python, Scikit-learn, Pandas

---

### Human Stress Prediction

Analyzed behavioral and physiological data to identify stress indicators.

**Tools:** Python, Machine Learning

---

### Cancer Incidence Analysis

Performed statistical analysis and visualization of cancer trends
using epidemiological datasets.

**Tools:** R, ggplot2, Statistical Modeling

---

## Skills

### Programming
- Python
- R
- SQL

### Data Science
- Machine Learning
- Statistical Modeling
- Data Visualization

### Tools
- Git
- Quarto
- Tableau
- Power BI

---

## Contact

- GitHub: https://github.com/DataWale
- Email: your-email@example.com
